title: Microenvironmental TGF-β is an early driver of NF1-associated tumor formation.
abstract: Neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1) is a common tumor predisposition syndrome characterized by neurofibromas, Nf1
authors: Alex Power; Salome Stierli; Elizabeth Harford-Wright; Guillem Mòdol-Caballero; Emma Lloyd; Stella Kouloulia; Giulia Casal; Nuo Yuan; Lara Krasinska; Omar Bouricha; Ilaria Napoli; Sara Ribeiro; Cristina Venturini; Melanie P Clements; Simona Parrinello; Alison C Lloyd
